source: Backlog completion session: stack.sh removal, doc updates, create-all-backlog-tickets script. Link to PR #5.

tickets.title: [X Platform] Remove stack.sh references and consolidate docs
tickets.description:
## Summary
Remove references to non-existent stack.sh; consolidate platform CLI as single stack entry point.

## Changes
- docs/repository-architecture-deep-dive.md: remove stack.sh, update frontend description
- docs/runbooks/platform-cli-workflow.md: remove service-local stack section
- AGENTS.md: simplify stack script guidance
- services/omnichannel/README.md: replace stack.sh with platform CLI

## Validation
- grep -r stack.sh docs/ AGENTS.md services/ returns no matches

## PR
#5 (pr/4-verify-nx)

tickets.title: [X Platform] Linear backlog completion runbook and batch script
tickets.description:
## Summary
Add runbook and script for creating all Linear tickets from backlog payloads.

## Changes
- docs/runbooks/linear-backlog-completion.md
- scripts/linear/create-all-backlog-tickets.sh
- docs/backlog/x-platform-repo-hygiene-tickets.json: update Node dependency ticket

## Validation
- ./scripts/linear/create-all-backlog-tickets.sh --dry-run (or with LINEAR_API_KEY)

## PR
#5
